resources.string: Lock your private apps with PIN, Pattern, or Fingerprint.
Hide your personal photos and videos securely.
Capture wrong unlock attempts and protect your privacy.
Pick the lock you\'ll use to open the app. You can add fingerprint unlock in the next steps.
Draw a pattern to unlock — quick and easy.
This PIN keeps your vault secure.
Use your fingerprint or face to unlock instantly.
Biometric unlock isn\'t available on this device. You can still use your PIN.
App lock and vault are ready.
%1$d apps locked · Last scan: Just now
Lock automatically when app goes to background
That PIN is too easy to guess. Choose another.
Save this key somewhere safe. It is the only way to reset your PIN if you forget it.
You won\'t be able to see this key again. If it is lost, your vault cannot be recovered in future encrypted phases.
Enter your recovery key to set a new PIN.
Too many attempts. Try again in %1$s.
Verify it\'s you before changing your PIN.
New PIN must differ from the current one.
Confirm your PIN to change security settings.
Confirm your pattern to change security settings.
After 5 wrong attempts the app locks for 30 seconds; after 10, for 5 minutes. Always on.
No private photos yet. Import some to get started.
No private videos yet. Import some to get started.
No albums yet. Create one to organize your media.
Do you want to remove the original files from your gallery?
Imported successfully. You can delete originals from your gallery manually.
Selected items will be moved to the recycle bin.
This permanently deletes the selected files. This can\'t be undone.
All items in the recycle bin will be permanently deleted.
The album will be deleted. Your media stays safe in the main vault.
Some files could not be exported
Encrypting your existing photos and videos. Please keep the app open.
Keeps App Lock running while enabled.
Protected apps are being monitored on this device.
App Lock needs a few permissions to protect your apps. You stay in control — grant them from system Settings.
Required to detect when a protected app is opened.
Required to show the lock screen when protected apps are opened.
Required to keep App Lock protection running.
Usage Access helps App Lock detect when a protected app is opened. This information stays on your device and is never uploaded, sold, or shared.
Lock delay, re-lock rules and more
Grant permissions to start protecting apps.
Setup complete — now choose apps to lock
Protect selected apps with your master credential
How long an app stays unlocked after unlocking
Lock protected apps again when the screen turns off
Lock again when you leave a protected app
Display the ongoing App Lock notification
%1$s was added to your locked apps.
Tap to protect %1$s with App Lock.
Choose how the lock screen looks
Don\'t show the locked app\'s name
Lock again when the device is locked
Keep sensitive screens out of recents
Keep simple counters on this device
Keep protection running in the background
Resume protection when the device restarts
Check setup and fix common issues
This theme is used when a protected app is opened.
Apps that often hold private content. Review and lock the ones you want.
Override the global settings for this app.
Apply per-app rules instead of global
Stats stay on this device and are never uploaded or shared.
Alerts when an intruder photo is captured.
A wrong unlock attempt was recorded.
Wrong unlock attempts will appear here.
This permanently removes the record and its photo.
All intruder records and photos will be permanently deleted.
This alert is no longer available
Export this intruder photo to your gallery?
Capture a front-camera photo after wrong unlock attempts. You control everything.
Capture a photo after wrong PIN/pattern attempts
Camera permission is used only to capture an intruder photo after multiple wrong unlock attempts. Photos stay on your device and are never uploaded or shared.
How many wrong attempts before a photo is taken
Notify you when a photo is captured
Show only a generic security alert
Keep at most this many alerts
Intruder photos are stored locally on your device, encrypted when enabled, and are never uploaded, sold, or shared.

Usage Access Permission
This app uses Usage Access only to detect when apps selected by the user are opened, so the app can show the lock screen. Usage data is processed locally on the device and is not uploaded, sold, shared, or used for advertising.

Display Over Other Apps
This app uses Display Over Other Apps only to show the lock screen over protected apps.

Foreground Service
This app uses a foreground service to keep App Lock protection active while enabled by the user.

Intruder Alert
Intruder Alert uses the device camera only after the user enables the feature and only after wrong PIN or Pattern attempts. Intruder photos are stored locally on the device, encrypted when enabled, and are not uploaded, sold, or shared.

Premium Tools
Premium cleanup tools such as duplicate finder, large file finder, and storage analyzer process vault files locally on the device. No photos, videos, documents, notes, file names, or analysis results are uploaded or shared.

Private Notes and Private Documents are stored locally in encrypted form. The app does not upload or share this content.

Hidden and locked albums are privacy features controlled by the user and stored locally on the device.
Camera permission is used to capture private photos and videos directly into your encrypted vault.
Microphone permission is used only when you record private videos with sound.
Keep screen awake while camera open
Not enough storage to save private media
Audio permission denied. Recording muted video.
Selected quality is not supported on this device
Capture secure photos and videos directly into your vault.
More premium tools are on the way. Everything is processed locally on your device — nothing is uploaded.
Private notes, documents and vault tools.
Encrypted notes stored only on this device
No notes yet. Tap + to create one.
Securely store your personal cards and files
No documents yet. Tap + to import.
A decrypted copy will be saved to the location you choose, leaving the encrypted vault. Continue?
Some documents could not be imported
Securely store your personal cards and files
Add ID cards, licences, passports, and private documents securely.
Add a name, number or image first
Please verify to view full number
This will create a decrypted copy outside your vault. Continue?
This card will be moved to Deleted.
This card and its images will be permanently removed.
Find files taking the most space
Free up space used by temporary files
See what\'s using your vault space
%1$d item(s) (%2$s) will be moved to the Recycle Bin. You can restore them later.
Tap scan to find byte-identical photos in your vault.
